scripts.title: Moderna's Big Jump
scripts.hook: Moderna jumped over 10 percent today, leading the market.

beats.vo: Moderna shares climbed by just over 10 percent, closing near 80 dollars.
beats.caption: Moderna JUMPS 10%

beats.vo: This move came after investor Jim Cramer expressed his renewed confidence in the stock, telling investors he likes having a position.
beats.caption: Cramer "Likes" Moderna

beats.vo: He highlighted Moderna’s significant gains throughout the year, noting its strong performance leading into the final week before Q2 earnings.
beats.caption: Strong Year, Q2 Earnings Ahead

scripts.cta: What do you think of Moderna's move?
scripts.disclaimer: For information only — not financial advice.
scripts.fbCaption: Moderna's stock surged today after Jim Cramer shared his positive outlook on the company. We break down the reasons behind the biotech's jump. For information only — not financial advice.

scripts.title: Tech Swings: Apple, Netflix Up; Tesla, Arm Down
scripts.hook: Tech and consumer stocks saw big moves today, both up and down.

beats.vo: Apple rose nearly 5 percent, with news of its plans for a major iPhone lineup expansion between late 2026 and early 2027, including its first foldable iPhone.
beats.caption: Apple plans Foldable iPhone

beats.vo: Netflix also gained almost 5 percent. The streaming giant's latest earnings report showed it delivering an asset-light cash haul, contrasting with Disney's heavier investment in parks.
beats.caption: Netflix posts Cash Haul

beats.vo: Meanwhile, Tesla dropped about 7 and a half percent. This followed investor Bill Ackman explaining why he wouldn't buy the stock, and a cautious analyst outlook amid robotaxi and Optimus developments.
beats.caption: Tesla Drops on Analyst Caution

beats.vo: Arm Holdings fell just under 7 percent, pulling back from its peak levels despite reporting another quarter of solid revenue growth, driven by its robust licensing business and AI-fueled demand.
beats.caption: Arm Pulls Back from Peak

scripts.disclaimer: For information only — not financial advice.
scripts.fbCaption: From Apple's foldable iPhone plans to Tesla's slide and Arm Holdings' pullback, we recap today's big movers in tech and consumer stocks. For information only — not financial advice.
